lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

VehicleSpeed.comment: Vehicle speed read on the CAN

UPAStatusFrame.LED.comment: To read the UPA or HFP switch LED state

lists.0: the button has not been pushed yet
lists.1: the button was pushed at least one time

UPAStatusFrame.Trailer tow.comment: To read the trailer presence (trailer connected to ECU)

cfg.RearDetectionState.comment: Rear Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

cfg.FrontDetectionState.comment: Front Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

lists.3: HFP function present and switch used for HFP

lists.0: LED is light when UPA is OFF
lists.1: LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

cfg.BuzzerSoundIndex.comment: Sound level index, change parameter when User preference menu or Diag tool.

gcfg.RearDetectionState.comment: Rear Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

gcfg.FrontDetectionState.comment: Front Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

lists.3: HFP function present and switch used for HFP

lists.0: LED is light when UPA is OFF
lists.1: LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

gcfg.BuzzerSoundIndex.comment: Sound level index, change parameter when User preference menu or Diag tool.

cfg.BSW_Presence.comment: Define if the BSW feature is present or not

cfg.BSW_Switch_Presence.comment: Define if the BSW feature uses a switch or not

cfg.4WS_VehicleEquipped.comment: Engineering config for HFP and FKP

cfg.SideDetectionState.comment: Rear detection state, change parameter when Switch push, User preference menu or Diag tool.

gcfg2.4WS_VehicleEquipped.comment: Engineering config for HFP and FKP

gcfg2.SideDetectionState.comment: Rear detection state, change parameter when Switch push, User preference menu or Diag tool.

gcfg2.BSW_Switch_Presence.comment: Define if the BSW feature uses a switch or not

gcfg2.BSW_Presence.comment: Define if the BSW feature is present or not

lists.0: LEDs are OFF under/over speed thresholds
lists.1: LEDs are ON under/over speed thresholds

RoutineIdentifierList.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.

IOCTL.DataIdentifier.comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

BSW_SystemStatus.comment: To read the BSW system state

HFP_StateMachine.comment: To read the HFP statemachine state
